basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Non-Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Non-Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website www.iiml.ac.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the IIM Lucknow Non-Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation is relaxable to SC/ST/OBC/PwBD category as per Central Government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate/MBA with 60% marks, Postgraduate with 60% marks, Graduate/PG with 60% marks in Commerce/Business Administration, Graduate with 60% marks
qualification.details: Manager (Dean NC Office): Postgraduate / MBA from a reputed institute/university in a regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. 05-years relevant experience out of which minimum 02 years in managerial capacity. Experience in administration, GFR, GeM procedures, tendering process. Assistant Manager (MDP NC): Postgraduate from a reputed institute/university in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum 1-2 years of relevant experience. Junior Manager (Purchase): Graduate/PG with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA in either Graduation or Postgraduation from a recognized University/Institute in regular mode preferably in Commerce/Business administration. Minimum 1-2 years relevant experience in purchase office. Programme Assistant (Human Resources-HR): Graduate from a reputed Institute/University in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum 1-2 years of relevant experience in Personnel/HR matters, Hindi translation. Programme Assistant (Admissions): Graduate from a reputed Institute/University in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum 1-2 years of relevant experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIM Lucknow Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIM Lucknow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Manager (Dean NC Office): Postgraduate / MBA from a reputed institute/university in a regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. 05-years relevant experience out of which minimum 02 years in managerial capacity. Experience in administration, GFR, GeM procedures, tendering process. Assistant Manager (MDP NC): Postgraduate from a reputed institute/university in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum 1-2 years of relevant experience. Junior Manager (Purchase): Graduate/PG with a minimum of 60% marks or equivalent CGPA in either Graduation or Postgraduation from a recognized University/Institute in regular mode preferably in Commerce/Business administration. Minimum 1-2 years relevant experience in purchase office. Programme Assistant (Human Resources-HR): Graduate from a reputed Institute/University in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum 1-2 years of relevant experience in Personnel/HR matters, Hindi translation. Programme Assistant (Admissions): Graduate from a reputed Institute/University in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks. Minimum 1-2 years of relevant experience.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation is relaxable to SC/ST/OBC/PwBD category as per Central Government rules.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Lucknow Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Lucknow Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the IIM Lucknow Non-Faculty Positions is 02-07-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Non-Faculty Positions at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Non-Faculty Positions announced by IIM Lucknow. These positions are spread across various departments and roles within the institute.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, but generally include Postgraduate/MBA with 60% marks, or Graduate/PG with 60% marks in Commerce/Business Administration, or Graduate with 60% marks from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the IIM Lucknow Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Non-Faculty Positions at IIM Lucknow is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these positions.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary range for the Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The salary for these positions ranges from Rs. 58,760/- to Rs. 1,07,930/- per month, depending on the specific post and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIM Lucknow Non-Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Are these positions contractual or permanent?
faq.answer: The job type for these Non-Faculty Positions at IIM Lucknow is contractual.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF is available in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the IIM Lucknow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIM Lucknow or via the direct application link provided in the "Important Links" section on or before the last date, 02-07-2026.
